creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
C Fan,

if you don't use a pseudonym when filing bug reports, we have a chance
to speak to you and not a pseudo person ;)

1) please remove the CFLAGS and try to compile with default CFLAGS. You
really need to know what you're doing when trying to use different
CFLAGS for kernel and world.

2) please compile a WITNESS and INVARIANTS enabled kernel and see if you
get anything out in dmesg.

I expect you're getting a stable system with option 1) but 2) may still
give you something like an LOR and similar messages.

Please try the suggestions and post your findings.

Volker
